title: aldama iltisii
intro: Aldama iltisii, also known as the shrub or plant in the family Malvaceae, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aldama iltisii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Aldama iltisii can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
